lessonText: Tap a tile, then tap an empty board space. Place all seven tiles so the lines enclose exactly the letters in the target word, in any order. When you're ready to submit, tap the checkmark.
Select a tile and use the arrow buttons to rotate it in order to close the target word.
Watch for the other sections you close alongside the target word. Empty sections and single letters are allowed, but longer closures must spell real words. Collect bonus words in your word list.
